data.title: Coinbase Derivatives to Launch 24/7 Crypto Futures Trading
data.description:
TL;DR Coinbase Derivatives is set to introduce Bitcoin and Ethereum futures contracts with uninterrupted trading in the U.S., eliminating the time constraints of traditional markets. The initiative aims to bridge the gap with global markets, where over 75% of trading volume occurs outside the U.S. The contracts will be regulated by the CFTC and supported by ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/coinbase-derivatives-to-launch-24-7-crypto-futures-trading/

data.title: Strategy Bitcoin holdings value falls below $40 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Saylortracker website information, the current market value of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy)'s Bitcoin holdings has fallen below $40 billion. Data shows that Strategy's Bitcoin holdings are 499,096 BTC. Based on the current price of about $79,358.02 per Bitcoin, Strategy's Bitcoin holdings are worth about $39.65 billion.

data.title: In the past hour, Tether Treasury deposited 83.55 million USDT to Binance and Bitfinex
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by The Data Nerd, in the past hour, Tether Treasury deposited 83.55 million USDT into Binance and Bitfinex, of which 58.18 million USDT was deposited into Binance and 25.37 million USDT was deposited into Bitfinex.

data.description:

data.title: CNBC: Multiple macroeconomic indicators have attracted attention this week, and market concerns may continue to drag down cryptocurrency prices in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin was dragged down by the continued selling pressure in the U.S. stock market, and its price once fell below the $80,000 mark. The stock prices of companies related to the cryptocurrency field also fell, with Coinbase falling by about 9%. Robinhood fell 13% and Strategy fell 11%. This week, the market will focus on key economic indicators, including Tuesday's JOLTs job openings data, Wednesday's consumer price index and Thursday's producer price index. Due to the lack of catalysts to stimulate the rise of cryptocurrencies, the market is worried that macroeconomic conditions may continue to drag down cryptocurrency prices in the short term. (CNBC)

data.title: Coinbase to Launch Cookie DAO (COOKIE)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase announced that it will add support for Cookie DAO (COOKIE) on the Base network. Please do not send this asset through other networks, otherwise funds may be lost.
